steps.title: Identify what the curator must prove
steps.content: The curator claims the pieces represent the dances of local communities Dai visited. To prove this, evidence must connect the piece to an actual dance from a community Dai encountered during her travels.

steps.title: Match the evidence
steps.content:
Choice C states that Yao Drum was "inspired by a ceremonial dance Dai witnessed... among the Yao people in Guizhou in 1941 or 1942." This directly proves the piece is based on an actual community's dance.

The other choices describe technical features (A, D) or deny real-life references (B), never establishing the cultural source.

This is exactly the evidence the curator needs.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
